---
title: "Three Points of Defect"
author: "Stepan Paul"
date: "2023-04-01"
description: "Origami contribution to the *Polyplane* exhibit"
image: "images/threepointsofdefect.jpeg"
image-alt: "origami polyhedron"
categories: Illustration
---

!["Three Points of Defect" origami sculpture](images/threepointsofdefect.jpeg){width = 60%}

"Three Points of Defect" was my contribution to the *Polyplane* travelling exhibit in 2023---apparently the only origami submission. See the [project page](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1TZmdh4xLF9R-3ZT0_bmShfE_8TWkV-0VdxDNWYAVNU8/edit?usp=sharing) for details!
